eds.model.Order

Package
Description
eds.model
MVC model layer of the application.

  • Uses of Order in eds.model

    Methods in eds.model that return types with arguments of type Order
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Order>
    IMatchEngine.MatchResult.completedOrders()
    Returns the value of the completedOrders record component.
    Optional<Order>
    OrderBook.getBestAskOrder()
    Returns the best ask order currently resting in the book.
    Optional<Order>
    OrderBook.getBestBidOrder()
    Returns the best bid order currently resting in the book.
    Methods in eds.model with parameters of type Order
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    OrderBook.addOrder(Order order)
    Adds a LIMIT order to the appropriate side of the order book.
    void
    StatisticsCollector.arrival(Order order)
     
    void
    StatisticsCollector.completion(Order order, double completionTime)
     
    IMatchEngine.MatchResult
    IMatchEngine.match(Order incoming, OrderBook book, double currentTime)
    Attempts to match an incoming order against the order book.
    IMatchEngine.MatchResult
    MatchEngine.match(Order incoming, OrderBook book, double currentTime)
    Processes an incoming order and attempts to match it against the order book.
    void
    OrderBook.removeOrder(Order order)
    Removes a specific order from the book.
